title: Add --version flag to CLI
summary: Add a --version callback to the Typer CLI that prints the spec-orch version. Read the version from pyproject.toml metadata using importlib.metadata.
builder_prompt:
Add a --version flag to the spec-orch CLI.

1. In src/spec_orch/cli.py, add a version callback to the Typer app that prints the version when --version is passed.
2. Use importlib.metadata.version('spec-orch') to get the version string, with a fallback to 'dev' if metadata is not available.
3. Add the version callback to the existing @app.callback() function.
4. Run ruff check src/ and fix any lint errors.
5. Run the tests with pytest tests/ -q to make sure nothing is broken.
acceptance_criteria: Version is read from package metadata with fallback

context.architecture_notes: The CLI uses Typer. The @app.callback() already exists. Use the standard Typer version callback pattern.
